title: [BTA!]比冒险更好！简体中文翻译包
description: 比冒险更好！(Better Than Adventure!) 简体中文翻译包
body:
![Main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3ffea1b3e1b0ab9b5868716106c9275ec0423e5_0.webp)
# Better Than Adventure! 简体中文翻译包 (Better Than Adventure! Simplified Chinese Language Pack)

## Chinese Version | 中文版本
这是一个用于Better Than Adventure! 7.3_01及以上 的翻译包，翻译包内的翻译尽可能贴合**Minecraft Wiki**所给出的标准译名，为了确保效率，部分条目使用DeepSeek进行翻译，由于AI翻译 难免会出现一些谬误，欢迎给出更好的译名意见！

### 使用方法
1.**无需解压**，将该语言包移动至```...\实例名称\.minecraft\languages```文件夹下即可。

2.在游戏内依次点击Options... -> Language Packs -> ▽ Language Packs -> 简体中文（中国大陆）即可应用该语言包！

### 部分译名的更改
- (GUI)Texture Packs -> 材质包 （直译为“纹理包”）
- (物品)Sulfur -> 火药 （直译为“硫磺”）
- (成就)Frozen Over -> 逆界冰泉 （DeepSeek翻译）
- (成就)On a rail -> 铁路之上 （Wiki给出的翻译为“在铁路上”）（应用了《半条命》“铁路之上”章节的名称）
- (描述) -> Braised meat from a pig. Smoking! -> 猪身上的烤肉，热气腾腾！& 恢复10点生命值，最多堆叠4个（加入了生命值恢复说明和堆叠上限等一些有用的翻译）

...

## English Version
This is a language pack for Better Than Adventure! 7.3_01 and above. The translations in this pack strive to closely align with the standardized translations provided by the Minecraft Wiki.
To ensure efficiency, some entries were translated using DeepSeek. As AI translation may occasionally contain errors, we welcome suggestions for better translations!

### How to Use
**Do not unzip the file.** Simply move the language pack to the ```...\Instance Name\.minecraft\languages ``` folder.

In the game, navigate to:
Options... → Language Packs → ▽ Language Packs → 简体中文 (中国大陆)
to apply the language pack!

### Translation Refinement
- (GUI) Texture Packs → 材质包 (Literally translated as "纹理包")
- (Item) Sulfur → 火药 (Literally translated as "硫磺")
- (Advancement) Frozen Over → 逆界冰泉 (Translated by DeepSeek)
- (Advancement) On a rail → 铁路之上 (The Wiki translation is "在铁路上"; this version references the chapter name "铁路之上" from _Half-Life_)
- (Description) Braised meat from a pig. Smoking! → 猪身上的烤肉，热气腾腾！& 恢复10点生命值，最多堆叠4个 (Added practical details such as regeneration and stack limit)

...
